name: virtual-webcam-driver
description: Electron control surface for DroidCam on Linux with preview, status monitoring, profiles, logs, and OBS launch.

scripts.capture:screenshot: mkdir -p docs/screenshots && env -u ELECTRON_RUN_AS_NODE VIRTUAL_WEBCAM_DRIVER_DEMO=1 VIRTUAL_WEBCAM_DRIVER_CAPTURE_PATH=docs/screenshots/dashboard.png electron --no-sandbox .
